---
title: "Technical Blog"
format:
  html:
    theme: cosmo
---

## Welcome

This is a technical blog covering quantum computing research and applications.

---

## Projects

### Refrigerant Chemistry ADAPT-VQE (January 2026)
Quantum methods applied to molecular simulation problems in chemistry.

[Read more](refrigerant-chemistry-adapt-vqe.html)

---

### LLM-guided ADAPT-VQE (March 2026)
Exploring LLM-assisted operator selection in adaptive variational quantum algorithms.

[Read more](llm-guided-adapt-vqe.html)
